videos.title: Some Fun XC Tricks at Trail Creek - Jackson, WY
Jackson Hole Ski and Snowboard Club-Moose Chase Marathon
videos.channel: Jackson Hole WY Real Estate with Dan Visosky
videos.description: The Jackson Hole Ski and Snowboard Club helps keep winter sports affordable for kids in Teton County.  One of their largest events is the Moose Chase Marathon, which has been a tradition since the early 1980's.  The Moose Chase Marathon is held at the Trail Creek Nordic Center in Wilson, WY, and consists of professional (former Olympians) and amateur racers from the Intermountain West. These racers compete in a variety of distances including a 30K, 15K, 5K, 3K and 1/2K- in the skate or classic ski techniques.  There are a few hundred participants each year and all of the races consist of mass starts which makes for an exciting race.

videos.title: Jackson Hole High School: Wyoming HS Nordic Championchips 2012
videos.description: Jackson Hole High School guys and girls win state. Guys earned the top five spots in the skate race and were able to achieve the highest score possible. This is just a little video of them running up to receive the trophy.

videos.title: 2008 Coney Classic in Jackson Hole, Wyo.
videos.description: More than 100 people and their costumed canine companions participated Feb. 11, 2007 in the Coney Classic Fun-Jor at the Teton Village Nordic Center to raise money for several animal-related nonprofits.
videos.transcript:

videos.title: Jackson Hole Ski Club
videos.description: The JHSC mission is to train, inspire and encourage the next generation of professional athletes.

videos.title: JACKSON HOLE ATHLETE: MADISON ROSE OSTERGREN
videos.description:
We are excited to announce a new addition to the Jackson Hole Mountain Resort Athlete Team: Madison Rose Ostergren! Madison's infectious stoke for skiing and passion for life in Jackson Hole made it a no-brainer to bring her onto the team and add another all-star to our lineup. Welcome, Madison!
Follow Madison on Instagram @ madisonnnrose.

videos.title: Skijoring in Jackson Hole - Click in and Hang on for the Ride
videos.description: There is no better representation of the historic crossroad of cowboys and skiers in Jackson Hole than the sport of Skijoring. The race consists of an adrenaline packed 15-20 seconds where a skier gets pulled behind a horse, reaching speeds of up to 40 miles per hour while maneuvering various gates and obstacles.  One of the fastest sports on snow returned to Jackson Hole Mountain Resort in February and the action was hot!

videos.title: Never Too Early to Nordic Ski in Jackson Hole
videos.description: Kids in Jackson Hole start Nordic skiing early - Real family fun in Grand Teton National Park and groomed trails of Jackson Hole!
